items.title: The Pistons Summer League roster sets up to give Ebuka Okorie plenty of reps to run an offense that will also include Chaz Lanier, Isaac Jones and Ugonna Onyenso.
items.author: Keith Langlois
items.body_excerpt:
The Pistons Summer League roster sets up to give Ebuka Okorie plenty of reps to run an offense that will also include Chaz Lanier, Isaac Jones and Ugonna Onyenso.

www.nba.com/pistons/news...

media.title: Summer League roster built to give Okorie keys to Pistons offense
media.description: Ebuka Okorie is going to get plenty of chances to show the ability to run his team’s offense when the Pistons get to Las Vegas for Summer League.

items.title: Pistons summer league roster is headlined by their draft picks, Ebuka Okorie and Ugonna Onyenso, last year’s pick Chaz Lanier and Michigan alumnus Roddy Gayle Jr.
items.author: Omari Sankofa II
items.body_excerpt: Pistons summer league roster is headlined by their draft picks, Ebuka Okorie and Ugonna Onyenso, last year’s pick Chaz Lanier and Michigan alumnus Roddy Gayle Jr.
